calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is proper and no one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 21, 2017 is admitted to probate. Nancy M. A. Montgomery and Diana Montgomery are appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
